contraindications.contraindication_name: hypersensitivity to hydrocortisone, iodoquinol, or any excipients
contraindications.reason: Allergic reactions including contact dermatitis may occur.

contraindications.contraindication_name: untreated skin infections (bacterial, fungal, viral, parasitic)
contraindications.reason: Topical corticosteroids may mask or exacerbate infections; iodoquinol may not control all pathogens.
Corticosteroids may suppress immune response and promote dissemination.
Topical corticosteroids are contraindicated in syphilis-related skin lesions.

contraindications.contraindication_name: viral skin infections (herpes simplex, varicella, vaccinia)
application to eyes or periocular area
contraindications.reason: Ophthalmic use may cause glaucoma, cataracts, or irritation; iodoquinol may be irritating.
Iodoquinol is an iodinated compound; cross-reactivity may occur.

contraindications.contraindication_name: pregnancy (topical use over large areas, prolonged use)
contraindications.reason: Pregnancy category C; systemic absorption of corticosteroids and iodoquinol may pose risk.

contraindications.contraindication_name: lactation (application to nipple or extensive areas)
contraindications.reason: Excretion in breast milk unknown; iodoquinol may cause rash or thyroid suppression in infant.

contraindications.contraindication_name: pediatric use (very young infants; extensive or occlusive application)
contraindications.reason: Increased systemic absorption risk leading to HPA axis suppression and iodoquinol neurotoxicity or thyroid effects.
Systemic absorption of iodoquinol may alter thyroid function tests or exacerbate thyroid disease.
Systemic absorption of iodoquinol may increase risk of adverse effects including neurotoxicity.

contraindications.contraindication_name: concomitant use of organic nitrates (e.g., nitroglycerin, isosorbide mononitrate)
contraindications.reason: Potentiates hypotensive effects; can cause severe, potentially fatal hypotension.

contraindications.contraindication_name: concomitant use of soluble guanylate cyclase stimulators (e.g., riociguat)
contraindications.reason: Additive hypotensive effects; co-administration is contraindicated.

contraindications.contraindication_name: hypersensitivity to sildenafil or any excipients
contraindications.reason: History of allergic reaction to the drug.

contraindications.contraindication_name: severe cardiac disease (unstable angina, recent myocardial infarction, severe aortic stenosis, NYHA class III/IV heart failure, uncontrolled arrhythmias, hypotension with SBP <90 mmHg)
contraindications.reason: Sexual activity and vasodilatory effects may pose excessive cardiovascular risk.

contraindications.contraindication_name: non-arteritic anterior ischemic optic neuropathy (NAION) history in one eye
contraindications.reason: Increased risk of NAION in the contralateral eye.
Safety not established; PDE5 inhibitors may affect retinal PDE6.

contraindications.contraindication_name: penile anatomical abnormalities (e.g., angulation, cavernosal fibrosis, Peyronie's disease)
contraindications.reason: Increased risk of priapism or penile injury.

contraindications.contraindication_name: conditions predisposing to priapism (sickle cell disease, multiple myeloma, leukemia)
co-administration with strong CYP3A4 inhibitors (e.g., ketoconazole, itraconazole, ritonavir)
contraindications.reason: Significantly increases sildenafil exposure; requires dose adjustment.
Additive hypotensive effect; must initiate at lowest dose and with caution.
Reduced clearance; consider alternative or dose reduction.

contraindications.contraindication_name: severe renal impairment (CrCl <30 mL/min or dialysis)
contraindications.reason: Decreased clearance; lower starting dose recommended.

contraindications.contraindication_name: pediatric use (except for pulmonary arterial hypertension under specialist care)
contraindications.reason: Not indicated for ED in children; safety and efficacy in PAH per guidelines.

contraindications.contraindication_name: hypersensitivity to alprostadil or any excipients

contraindications.reason: Pregnancy category X; may cause fetal harm or uterine contractility.

contraindications.contraindication_name: conditions predisposing to priapism (sickle cell disease, multiple myeloma, leukemia, hyperviscosity syndromes)
contraindications.reason: High risk of priapism when used for erectile dysfunction.

contraindications.contraindication_name: conditions in which sexual activity is inadvisable (unstable cardiovascular disease)
contraindications.reason: Cardiovascular risk associated with sexual exertion.

contraindications.reason: Prostaglandin E1 maintains PDA; may worsen certain defects.

contraindications.contraindication_name: severe respiratory distress syndrome (in PDA management)

contraindications.contraindication_name: bleeding diathesis or concurrent anticoagulation (for injectable ED use)
